flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Oregon rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Oregon rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.5k → $44.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Oregon fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Oregon rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (18.5k → 20.5k).
